title: Kaal Bhairav Mantra
intro: Read the Kaal Bhairav Mantra with meaning. Chant this mantra with devotion to receive the grace of Lord Kaal Bhairav.
description:
Main Mantra

Om Kalabhairavaya Namah.

English Meaning

Om,
I bow to
Lord Kalabhairava.

faq.q1: When should Kalabhairava Mantra be chanted?
faq.a1: Kalabhairava Mantra is considered auspicious when chanted in the morning, during midnight spiritual practice, or on Kalashtami.
faq.q2: How many times should Kalabhairava Mantra be chanted?
faq.a2: It is commonly chanted 11, 21, 51, or 108 times.
faq.q3: What are the benefits of chanting Kalabhairava Mantra?
faq.a3: According to Hindu tradition, chanting this mantra is believed to bring courage, protection, spiritual strength, and the blessings of Lord Kalabhairava.
faq.q4: Can Kalabhairava Mantra be chanted daily?
faq.a4: Yes, Kalabhairava Mantra can be chanted every day with devotion.
faq.a5: Yes, anyone may chant Kalabhairava Mantra with faith and devotion.
